rationale: Section 31.037 governs tax credits for business entities providing teaching services. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b) and contains no provisions affected by increasing the homestead exemption amount.
quote: The governing body of a school district by resolution may authorize a corporation or other business entity to permit a qualified individual employed by the business entity to perform teaching services in a high school or a junior high school for the school district in lieu of paying taxes imposed by the district on property owned by the business entity.
_note: No conflict identified; §31.037 addresses a separate school district tax credit program for business entities and does not reference the homestead exemption.
